name: Toffee Delight
recipeIngredient: Heath bars (4 or 5, broken into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crushed crackers, butter, and sugar; press mixture into a 13x9-inch pan.
2. Beat the instant pudding with milk until combined, then add the ice cream and pour over the crackers in the pan.
3. Spread the Cool Whip evenly on top of the layered dessert.
4. If desired, sprinkle the Heath bars over the top.
